---
title: <center> Physics Concepts as Indicative Framework for Modelling Systems of Economy </center>

subtitle: <center> Coincise Notes on Explorations and Conjectures of Natural Laws as sensored by the Anthropological Mind to Develop Allocation Structures of Finite Resouces </center>

bibliography: references.bib
csl: diabetologia.csl

nocite: |
  @*
---

\
\
<p style="text-align: center; color: slategray;">
*working paper draft* <br>
UNDER CONSTRUCTION
</p>

\
\
